name: FraudLinksDetectionKit
summary: AI-powered URL fraud detection SDK for iOS with HMAC authentication
description:
FraudLinksDetectionKit provides AI-powered URL fraud detection:
- Real-time URL analysis via REST API
- HMAC SHA256 authentication for secure API calls
- AI-powered threat intelligence
- Malicious link detection
- Comprehensive risk scoring
- Privacy-focused detection with internal authentication
